action_card.summary: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0).
actions: Deploy security staff for line control.

announcements.text: Attention passengers, safety alert: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). Please proceed with caution.
यात्रीगण कृपया ध्यान दें, सुरक्षा चेतावनी: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). कृपया सावधानी बरतें।
பயணிகளின் கவனத்திற்கு, பாதுகாப்பு எச்சரிக்கை: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). தயவுசெய்து எச்சரிக்கையுடன் தொடரவும்.
ప్రయాణీకుల భద్రత కొరకు హెచ్చరిక: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). దయచేసి జాగ్రత్తగా వ్యవహరించండి.
ଯାତ୍ରୀମାନଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ଚେତାବନୀ: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). ଦୟାକରି ସାବଧାନତା ଅବଲମ୍ବନ କରନ୍ତୁ।
যাত্রীসাধারণের সুরক্ষার জন্য সতর্কবার্তা: Crowd surge alert on Platform P2 of station NDLS (Score: 100.0). অনুগ্রহ করে সতর্ক থাকুন।
